name: @barlevalon/caveman-help-skill
description_en: Quick-reference card for all caveman modes, skills, and commands. One-shot display, not a persistent mode. Trigger: /caveman-help, "caveman help", "what caveman commands", "how do I use caveman".
description_zh: 所有穴居人模式、技能和命令的快速参考卡。一次性显示，不是持久模式。触发器：/caveman-help、"caveman help"、"what caveman commands"、"how do I use caveman"。
